comments.title: 🔥宏观避险情绪主导
comments.body: 市场处于宏观风险受抑阶段。BMRI 报 71 (RISK_OFF)，避险情绪浓厚。当前价格 $64,530 较 200 日成本倒挂 -16.9%，虽有估值支撑，但走势仍高度依赖油价与降息预期博弈。宏观流动性未松绑前，反弹难以持续。中性。流动性拐点何时确认？
comments.body_en: Market is in a macro risk-suppressed phase. BMRI sits at 71 (RISK_OFF)—risk-off sentiment is heavy. Price at $64,530 is trading -16.9% below the 200-day cost basis. While valuation offers support, price action remains highly dependent on the tug-of-war between oil prices and rate cut expectations. Without macro liquidity loosening, any rebound is unsustainable. Neutral. When will the liquidity inflection point be confirmed?

comments.title: 🔥存量博弈：资金回流BTC
comments.body: 市场处于存量资金避险阶段。BTC.D 报 58.5%，7 日逆势上涨 0.7%。在价格普跌 12.1% 的背景下，比特币主导度的提升证明资金正在从山寨币撤离并抱团 BTC。这种结构性分化意味着市场风险偏好极低，短期内难言全面回暖。中性。流动性困局何时打破？
comments.title_en: 🔥Zero-Sum Game: Capital Rotating Back to BTC
comments.body_en:
The market is currently in risk-off mode, trading within existing liquidity. BTC.D sits at 58.5%, bucking the trend with a 0.7% rise over the last 7 days.
With the market bleeding an average of 12.1%, the spike in Bitcoin dominance confirms capital is fleeing altcoins to crowd into BTC.
This structural divergence signals that risk appetite is rock bottom. A broad market recovery in the short term is unlikely.
Neutral.
When will the liquidity deadlock break?

comments.title: 🔥周期定位复刻22年底部
comments.body: 市场处于历史大级别底部震荡阶段。MVRV 报 1.19，该指标低于历史 81% 的时间，且数值逼近上轮周期底部（2022-07）的 0.98。尽管价格 7 日下跌 12.1%，但周期位置显示已深度复刻上轮熊市极值，长期胜率极高。偏多。历史是否在重演？
comments.body_en: The market is in a historical macro bottom consolidation phase. MVRV stands at 1.19, a level lower than 81% of historical records, and is approaching the 0.98 mark from the last cycle bottom (July '22). Despite a 12.1% drop over the last 7 days, cycle positioning shows we are deeply echoing the extremes of the previous bear market, giving a massive edge for the long term. Bullish bias. Is history repeating itself?

comments.title: 🔥估值进入深度击球区
comments.body: 市场处于深度低估状态。AHR999(3D)报0.33，落入抄底区间，价格较200日成本线深贴-16.9%。这意味着当前价格远低于长期持有者平均成本，下行空间被数据极值压缩。核心指标显示筹码锁定良好，盈亏比极具吸引力。偏多。左侧布局时机已至？
comments.body_en: The market is deeply undervalued. AHR999 (3D) prints 0.33, dropping into the accumulation zone, with price trading -16.9% below the 200-day cost basis. This implies current price is well below the long-term holder average cost; downside is being compressed by data extremes. Core metrics show supply is locked tight. The risk/reward is extremely attractive. Bias: Long. Time for left-side positioning?

comments.title: 🔥宏观避险压制估值
comments.body: 市场处于宏观流动性压制阶段。BMRI 报 71，显示资金处于 RISK_OFF 状态。虽然 AHR999 为 0.33 已进入抄底区，但价格 7 日仍下跌 12.1%，说明宏观悲观情绪盖过了链上低估值的吸引力。抄底信号暂时失效，需等待宏观面改善。风险偏好何时回暖？
comments.body_en: The market is stuck in a phase of macro liquidity suppression. BMRI sits at 71, signaling that capital is firmly in RISK_OFF mode. While AHR999 has dropped to 0.33—officially entering accumulation territory—prices are still down 12.1% over the past 7 days. This tells us macro pessimism is overpowering the appeal of on-chain undervaluation. Buy signals are temporarily offline until the macro backdrop improves. When will risk appetite return?

comments.title: 🔥存量博弈加剧资金回流
comments.body: 市场处于结构分化阶段。BTC.D 报 58.5%，7日逆势上涨 0.7%。价格较 200日成本偏离 -16.9%，资金却在撤离山寨币并涌入 BTC。该数值逼近 2026 年 6 月历史高位 59.19，避险效应显著。结构性偏多。山寨季何时开启？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Intensifying Liquidity Rotation Drives Capital Inflow
comments.body_en: The market is in a phase of structural divergence. BTC.D sits at 58.5%, bucking the trend with a 0.7% rise over the past 7 days. Despite price deviating -16.9% from the 200-day cost basis, capital is fleeing altcoins and flooding into BTC. This figure is approaching the historical high of 59.19 from June 2026, signaling a significant risk-off effect. Structurally bullish. When does altseason kick off?

comments.title: 🔥周期定位回撤至均值位
comments.body: 市场处于周期底部筑底阶段。MVRV 报 1.19，恰与 2026 年 6 月历史均值一致。该数值低于历史 81% 的时间，且高于上轮周期同期（2022-07）的 0.98，表明本轮底部支撑强于上一轮，筹码惜售明显。数据确认处于典型的时间换空间区。偏多。反攻信号何时确立？

comments.title: 🔥估值重回历史深寒区
comments.body: 市场处于历史级别的估值底部。AHR999(3D) 报 0.32，7 日暴跌 27.2%。该数值已低于 2022 年 7 月月均值 0.37，逼近当年 0.26 的极限低点。价格严重偏离 200 日成本线 19.8%，表明短期抛压已将价格砸穿长期持有者平均成本，浮盈筹码几乎被完全清洗。极致低估往往对应高盈亏比。偏多。底部构筑还需多久？
comments.body_en: The market is sitting at historic valuation lows. AHR999 (3D) hits 0.32, dumping 27.2% in 7 days. We’re below the July 2022 monthly average of 0.37 and nearing the extreme low of 0.26 from that year. Price is trading 19.8% below the 200-day cost basis—showing short-term selling pressure has smashed price through long-term holders' average cost. Floating profit is almost fully purged. Extreme undervaluation means high upside. Leaning bullish. How much longer for the bottom to form?

comments.title: 🔥宏观风控信号明确
comments.body: 市场处于宏观流动性压制阶段。BMRI 报 74（RISK_OFF），显示当前资金风险偏好低迷，杠杆意愿显著不足。虽读数略高于 5 月均值 66.76，但距离 95 以上的风险开启阈值仍有较大空间。油价波动干扰降息押注，宏观紧缩预期导致流动性无法有效传导。中性。宏观流动性何时逆转？
comments.body_en: The market is in a phase of macro liquidity suppression. The BMRI prints 74 (RISK_OFF), signaling depressed risk appetite and a notable lack of willingness to leverage. While the reading is slightly above the May average of 66.76, there’s still a significant gap to the 95+ risk-on trigger. Oil volatility is skewing rate cut bets, and macro tightening expectations are blocking effective liquidity transmission. Neutral. When will macro liquidity reverse?

comments.title: 🔥资金虹吸效应显著
comments.body: 市场处于存量博弈阶段。BTC.D 报 59.6%，尽管 7 日微跌 0.6%，但仍处于 2025 年中以来的高位区间。这表明资金继续集中在比特币，未向山寨币轮动。缺乏增量资金入场，整体市场结构依然偏紧，难以支撑全面行情。中性。风格切换何时开启？
comments.body_en: The market is currently in a zero-sum game phase. BTC.D stands at 59.6%. Despite a slight 7-day dip of 0.6%, it remains in a high range not seen since mid-2025. This indicates capital continues to concentrate in Bitcoin, with no rotation into altcoins. Lacking fresh inflows, the overall market structure remains tight, making it difficult to sustain a broad-based rally. Neutral. When will the rotation begin?

comments.title: 🔥周期估值优于上轮同期
comments.body: 市场处于周期复苏初期的估值修复区。MVRV 报 1.43，虽优于 2022 年同期的 1.05，但仍低于历史 64% 的时间。这表明当前网络盈利状况强于上轮熊市底部，估值性价比依然存在。市场未进入过热阶段，正处于长线资金积累筹码的窗口期。中性偏多。历史周期是否正在重演？
comments.body_en: The market is currently in a valuation reclamation zone, marking the early stages of cycle recovery. MVRV sits at 1.43. While this outperforms the 1.05 from the same period in 2022, it remains below 64% of historical levels. This indicates network profitability is stronger than the last bear market bottom—the valuation is still attractive. We haven't entered overheating territory yet; this is the accumulation window for long-term capital. Neutral-to-bullish. Is history rhyming?

comments.title: 🔥定投安全垫持续增厚
comments.body: 市场处于低估筑底阶段。AHR999 报 0.46 位于定投区，现价 $76,666 低于 200 日定投成本 $80,272，偏离度 -4.5%。当前价格已击穿长线持仓平均成本，显示市场正在通过亏损清洗浮筹，筹码分布向低成本区间集中，估值处于极具性价比位置。中性。底部磨多久？
comments.body_en: The market is in an undervalued, bottom-building phase. AHR999 sits at 0.46, firmly in the accumulation zone. Current price of $76,666 trades below the 200-day DCA cost of $80,272, a -4.5% deviation. Price has sliced below the average long-term holding cost, signaling a shakeout of weak hands. Chip distribution is consolidating at lower levels, making valuations extremely attractive. Neutral. How long will the bottom grind last?

comments.title: 🔥宏观风险偏好持续低迷
comments.body: 市场处于宏观避险阶段。BMRI指标报75（RISK_OFF），确认当前资金风险偏好极低，风险资产吸引力不足。虽然油价波动可能扰动美联储降息预期，但指标反馈出的紧缩现状未改。缺乏宏观流动性注入，市场难现大级别反转。中性。宽松拐点究竟在哪？
comments.body_en: The market is in a macro risk-off phase. The BMRI indicator reads 75 (RISK_OFF), confirming that risk appetite is extremely low and risk assets simply lack appeal. While oil volatility might be rattling Fed rate cut expectations, the data confirms that tightening conditions remain unchanged. Without an injection of macro liquidity, a major reversal is off the table. Neutral. Where exactly is the pivot to easing?

comments.title: 🔥存量博弈资金困守
comments.body: 市场处于典型的存量博弈阶段。BTC.D 报 59.9%，7 日微跌 0.6%，资金并未显著外溢至山寨币，避险情绪依然浓厚。当前价格低于 200 日定投成本，表明 BTC 自身吸引力不足，但场内缺乏能承接流动性的替代板块。高控盘状态下资金空转，无法形成有效合力。中性。轮动何时开启？
comments.body_en: The market is in a classic zero-sum game phase. BTC.D sits at 59.9%, down just 0.6% over the last 7 days—capital isn't spilling into alts, and risk-off sentiment remains thick. With price below the 200-day DCA cost, BTC itself lacks the pull to attract inflows, yet there’s no alternative sector capable of absorbing liquidity. Under tight control, funds are just churning in circles, failing to form any cohesive buying power. Neutral. When does the rotation start?

comments.title: 周期回调不及前低
comments.body: 市场处于周期探底阶段。MVRV报1.43，虽低于历史64%时间，但高于上轮同期（2022-06）的1.05。这意味着本轮估值清洗程度不如上轮极端，获利筹码出清并不彻底。当前并未达到历史最悲观的估值位置。中性。底还要磨多久？
comments.title_en: Cyclical pullback hasn't hit previous lows 🔥
comments.body_en: Market is in the cyclical bottom-finding phase. MVRV sits at 1.43. While this is lower than 64% of historical readings, it remains higher than the same period in the last cycle (June 2022) at 1.05. This implies the valuation flush this round hasn't been as extreme, and the clearance of profitable supply is incomplete. We haven't reached historically pessimistic valuation levels yet. Neutral. How much longer to grind this bottom?

comments.title: 🔥估值回归定投舒适区
comments.body: 市场处于成本线下的磨底阶段。AHR999跌至0.49，价格($79,067)低于200日定投成本($81,756)3.3%。长期持有筹码出现浮亏，抛压自然衰竭。当前深贴水结构限制了下跌空间，具备低盈亏比特征。中性。场外资金何时入场？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Valuation back in the DCA comfort zone
comments.body_en: The market is grinding out a bottom below cost basis. AHR999 has dropped to 0.49, with price ($79,067) sitting 3.3% below the 200-day DCA cost ($81,756). Long-term holders are now underwater, so selling pressure is naturally drying up. The current deep discount structure caps the downside, presenting a favorable risk/reward setup. Neutral. Question is, when will sidelined capital step in?

comments.title: 🔥宏观风险偏好仍低迷
comments.body: 市场受制于流动性紧缩。BMRI录得77（RISK_OFF），确认当前处于风险厌恶模式。虽油价下跌或引发降息押注，但在美联储政策转向前，$80,682 难以有效突破。资金面紧绷限制了反弹高度，需警惕外部宏观变量冲击。中性。流动性何时转向？
comments.body_en: Markets are constrained by liquidity tightening. BMRI prints 77 (RISK_OFF), confirming risk-off mode. Falling oil may fuel rate cut bets, but $80,682 is tough to crack before a Fed pivot. Tight liquidity caps the upside—watch for external macro shocks. Neutral. When does liquidity turn?

comments.title: 🔥市场结构极端分化
comments.body: 市场处于存量资金博弈的吸血阶段。BTC.D录得60.1%，处于近四年高位区，表明资金高度集中于比特币。伴随Aave缩减预算等利空，避险情绪升温导致资金从公链及DeFi板块流出，加剧了二八分化。在主导率未跌破58%前，山寨难有独立行情。中性。流动性枯竭将持续吗？
comments.body_en: The market is currently in a liquidity-siphoning phase. BTC.D has hit 60.1%, a four-year high, signaling that capital is hyper-concentrated in Bitcoin. With risk-off sentiment rising due to headwinds like Aave’s budget cuts, funds are flowing out of L1s and DeFi, exacerbating the structural divergence. We won't see any independent alt rallies until dominance drops below 58%. Neutral. Will the liquidity drought persist?

comments.title: 🔥本轮周期底明显抬高
comments.body: 市场处于估值结构性抬升期。MVRV录得1.49，大幅高于上轮周期同期（2022-06）的1.05。尽管AHR999处于定投区，但对比历史同期显示，当前筹码成本中枢明显上移。这种分化意味着市场难现深跌，后续若无量能配合，震荡将成为常态。中性。历史估值底还有效吗？
comments.title_en: 🔥 The floor for this cycle is clearly higher
comments.body_en: We are in a phase of structural valuation expansion. MVRV sits at 1.49, significantly outpacing the 1.05 from the same point in the last cycle (Jun '22). While AHR999 remains in the accumulation zone, a historical comparison shows that the average cost basis has clearly shifted upward. This divergence suggests deep sell-offs are unlikely. Unless we see volume support, sideways trading will become the new norm. Neutral. Are historical valuation bottoms still valid?

comments.title: 🔥定投价值信号明确
comments.body: 市场处于底部积累期。AHR999(3D)录得0.50处于定投区，价格$80,622较200日成本偏离-2.5%。估值回归长期支撑线，指标7日上涨6.2%反映底部承接意愿增强，定投赔率具吸引力。偏多。左侧布局时机到了吗？
comments.body_en: The market is in a bottom accumulation phase. AHR999 (3D) sits at 0.50, placing us squarely in the DCA zone. At $80,622, price is deviating just -2.5% from the 200-day cost basis. Valuation is reverting to the long-term support line, and with the 7-day indicator up 6.2%, buying pressure at the bottom is strengthening. The risk-reward for DCA is attractive. Bias: Bullish. Is it time for left-side entry?

comments.title: 🔥宏观紧缩限制上涨高度
comments.body: 市场受制于宏观流动性紧缩。BMRI 指标录得 78，处于 RISK_OFF 区域，显示资金风险偏好低迷。尽管 BTC 价格回升至 $81,018，但在宏观风险警报解除前，资金入场意愿不足，上涨动能难以持续。大级别反弹仍需等待宏观配合。中性。流动性拐点何时出现？

comments.title: 🔥吸血效应强化避险逻辑
comments.body: 市场呈现极端的结构性分化。BTC.D升至60.6%，7日增幅1.1%，在价格反弹5.9%的同时主导率不降反升。这证明本轮上涨并非由流动性普涨驱动，而是资金从山寨币撤离并涌入比特币的避险行为。存量博弈下，大币种吸干流动性导致市场缺乏做多合力。中性。存量博弈下山寨还有生机吗？

comments.title: 🔥本轮估值显著高于同期
comments.body: 市场处于结构性磨底期。MVRV 报 1.45，虽低于历史 62% 的时间，但较上轮周期同期（2022-06）的 1.05 高出 38%。这意味着本轮牛熊转换的底部支撑位已大幅抬升，并未出现历史极端低估的恐慌定价。中性。底部抬高是否意味着下跌空间有限？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Current valuations are significantly higher than the same period last cycle
comments.body_en: The market is in a structural bottoming phase. MVRV sits at 1.45. While lower than 62% of historical readings, it’s 38% higher than the same point in the last cycle (June 2022). This implies the support floor for this cycle's transition has been significantly elevated; we aren't seeing the panic pricing typical of historical extreme undervaluations. Neutral. Does a higher floor mean limited downside?

comments.title: 🔥指标触及定投黄金坑
comments.body: 市场深陷低估区域。AHR999(3D)报0.48处于定投区，当前价格$78,483低于200日定投成本$83,535，偏离-6.0%。这意味着市场平均持币成本被击穿，浮筹已大幅出清。低于长期成本的定价通常对应极高的安全边际与盈亏比。偏多。左侧机会确认了吗？
comments.body_en: Market is deep in undervalued territory. AHR999 (3D) is at 0.48, sitting right in the accumulation zone. Current price of $78,483 is below the 200-day DCA cost of $83,535, a -6.0% deviation. This means the average market cost basis has been broken through, and weak hands have been largely flushed out. Pricing below long-term cost typically correlates with massive safety margins and risk-reward ratios. Bullish. Is the left-side play confirmed?

comments.title: 🔥流动性修复助推反弹
comments.body: 宏观环境处于流动性修复期。BMRI 数值回升至 78，显著超越 4 月均值 61.32。虽然仍处于 RISK_OFF 状态，但金融条件的边际宽松支撑了 BTC 价格 7 日 2.3% 的涨幅。数据表明，当前反弹动力源于外部宏观预期改善，而非内部资金涌入。偏多。美联储转向是否在即？
comments.body_en: The macro environment is currently in a liquidity repair phase. BMRI has rebounded to 78, significantly outpacing April's average of 61.32. While we remain in RISK_OFF mode, the marginal easing of financial conditions has underpinned BTC’s 7-day gain of 2.3%. Data indicates that current momentum stems from improved external macro expectations rather than internal capital inflows. Leaning bullish. Is the Fed pivot imminent?

comments.title: 🔥资金避险推动吸血行情
comments.body: 市场呈现结构性分化。BTC.D 回升至 60.1%，7 日增长 1.5%，显示资金在反弹中优先拥抱比特币，避险属性强化。当前价格 $78,347 的上涨主要由比特币主导，而非流动性普溢。存量博弈下，山寨币流动性被进一步挤压。行情是反弹还是反转？

comments.title: 🔥周期定位复刻历史底
comments.body: 市场处于周期底部磨底阶段。MVRV 为 1.40，对比上轮周期同期（2022-05）的 1.32，当前估值定位极其接近历史大底。虽价格 7 日回升 2.4%，但仍偏离 200 日定投成本 -11.1%。数据表明市场处于绝望期尾部，具备极高的盈亏比。偏多。黎明前的黑暗还有多久？
comments.body_en: The market is currently grinding at the cycle bottom. MVRV sits at 1.40; compared to 1.32 during the same period of the last cycle (May '22), current valuation is tracking extremely close to the historical macro bottom. Despite a 2.4% 7-day rebound, price is still trading -11.1% below the 200-day DCA cost basis. Data suggests we are at the tail end of the despair phase, offering an asymmetric risk/reward setup. Bullish bias. How much longer before the dawn breaks?

comments.title: 🔥深度低估引发估值修复
comments.body: 市场处于低估修复期。MVRV 为 1.36，数值低于历史上 68% 的时间，且对比 2022 年 5 月的 1.32 优势微弱。当前价格 76,069 美元距 200 日定投成本 86,103 美元仍有 11.7% 的负偏离。这意味着长期持筹者普遍处于浮亏状态，抛压枯竭。偏多。距离回归成本线还有多远？
comments.body_en: The market is in a valuation recovery phase. MVRV sits at 1.36, lower than 68% of historical data, with only a slight edge over the 1.32 seen in May 2022. At $76,069, price remains 11.7% below the 200-day DCA cost basis of $86,103. This implies that long-term holders are largely underwater, leaving sell-side pressure exhausted. Leaning Bullish. How far until we reclaim the cost basis?

comments.title: 🔥宏观风险压制反弹高度
comments.body: 市场处于筑底修复期。BMRI 读数 78（RISK_OFF），表明宏观流动性环境未改善。受油价下跌影响，BTC 价格 7 日回升 4.4% 至 74,347 美元，但仍处于 200 日定投成本 86,327 美元下方，偏离达 13.9%。资金在强阻力区前依然谨慎。降息预期是否已过度交易？
comments.body_en: The market is in a bottoming and repair phase. BMRI sits at 78 (RISK_OFF), signaling that macro liquidity conditions haven't improved. BTC rebounded 4.4% over the last 7 days to $74,347, helped by falling oil prices, but it still trades 13.9% below the 200-day DCA cost of $86,327. Capital remains cautious ahead of strong resistance. Have rate cut expectations been over-traded?

comments.title: 🔥存量博弈，BTC主导格局未变
comments.body: 市场处于典型的存量博弈阶段，资金结构向比特币倾斜。BTC.D 数据录得 59.2%，7 日变化为 +0.5%。尽管近期价格波动，但持续处于 59% 上方的指标意味着资金并未流向山寨币，市场流动性依旧紧缩并集中于头部资产。这种结构下，山寨币难以启动独立行情。资金外溢信号何时出现？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Zero-sum game, BTC dominance remains unchanged
comments.body_en: The market is in a typical zero-sum game phase, with capital structure tilting towards Bitcoin. BTC.D sits at 59.2%, with a 7-day change of +0.5%. Despite recent volatility, the indicator holding above 59% means capital is not flowing into altcoins; market liquidity remains tight and concentrated in top-tier assets. Under this structure, altcoins struggle to launch independent rallies. When will the capital spillover signal appear?

comments.title: 🔥周期坐标重演22年深熊
comments.body: 市场处于深度熊市筑底期。AHR999(3D)报0.45，精准对应2022年6月均值0.44的历史极值。尽管指标7日反弹13.1%，但当前所处的时间节点与上轮周期底部高度重合。数据证实市场已完成深度出清，周期反转只需耐心等待。谁能熬过最后的至暗时刻？
comments.title_en: 🔥Cyclical Coordinates Reenact the '22 Deep Bear Market
comments.body_en: The market is in the deep bear market bottoming phase. AHR999 (3D) sits at 0.45, precisely matching the historical extreme of 0.44 from June 2022. Despite a 13.1% 7-day rebound, the current timeline heavily overlaps with the previous cycle's bottom. Data confirms the market flush is complete; the cycle reversal just requires patience. Who can survive the final darkest hour?

comments.title: 🔥周期估值回撤至22年深渊
comments.body: 市场处于周期性底部磨底阶段。MVRV读数为1.37，与2022年5月同期的1.32高度趋同，且低于历史上68%的时间。数据显示当前筹码估值已回归至上轮熊市的极寒区域，市场整体处于深度亏损状态。周期底部的确定性正在增加，耐心等待流动性转向。这是否意味着长线买点已现？

comments.title: 🔥宏观风险压制反弹空间
comments.body: 市场受宏观流动性压制，处于弱势筑底阶段。BMRI指标读数为73，深陷RISK_OFF区间，表明资金风险偏好极低。尽管BTC周内反弹5.8%，但若无外部流动性注入，涨势难以为继。当前走势高度依赖油价表现，只有降息预期重燃，才能打开上行空间。短期维持中性。美联储会转向吗？
comments.body_en: The market is weighed down by macro liquidity, stuck in a weak bottoming process. BMRI reads 73, deep in the RISK_OFF zone, signaling rock-bottom risk appetite. Despite BTC's 5.8% weekly bounce, this rally is unsustainable without an external liquidity injection. Price action is currently tied to oil; we won't see meaningful upside until rate cut expectations reignite. Neutral stance in the short term. Will the Fed pivot?

comments.title: 🔥存量资金加速回流大饼
comments.body: 市场处于流动性虹吸状态。BTC.D触及59.1%，7日激增1.9%。尽管BTC价格较200日成本倒挂16.9%，但资金选择逃离山寨币而非抄底。数据显示，这并非增量资金推动的普涨，而是存量博弈下的避险轮动。山寨币正在失血，市场极度厌恶风险。这种二八分化还要持续多久？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Liquidity is aggressively rotating back into BTC
comments.body_en: The market is caught in a liquidity siphon. BTC.D hit 59.1%, surging 1.9% in just 7 days. Despite BTC trading at a 16.9% discount to the 200-day cost basis, capital is choosing to flee alts rather than buy the dip. The data makes it clear: this isn't an across-the-board rally driven by new inflows, but a risk-off rotation within existing liquidity. Alts are bleeding out, and risk aversion is at an extreme. How much longer will this divergence last?

comments.title: 🔥估值跌入历史极值区间
comments.body: 市场处于深度筑底阶段。AHR999为0.40处于抄底区，价格较200日成本$88,080倒挂17.2%。MVRV仅1.33，低于历史71%的时间，且持平于2022年5月。核心指标共振显示筹码已极度低估，具备高赔率特征。这是黎明前的至暗时刻吗？
